codeReview.summary: The feature adds broad auto-link recording and integration points, but it misses required mapping behavior and does not implement stale-link replacement semantics for reruns.

issues.description: Re-runs do not update stale links: merge_links/2 only replaces links with the exact same {type, file_path} key and keeps old paths (kept ++ new_normalized). When codegen output path changes, stale links remain instead of being replaced/marked, which violates the feature requirement and VAL-TAUTO-008.

record_links/4 maps only task_map["related_specs"] and never reads task_map["context"] for entity references. The feature explicitly requires mapping task context (including entity refs) to traceability entries, so cross-spec links implied by refs are currently not captured.

Auto-generated links only include type + file_path and have no API-specific function targeting; infer_link_type/2 also ignores category (line 150). This weakens VAL-TAUTO-003 coverage because there is no mechanism to ensure API links resolve to route/controller handler functions beyond filename heuristics.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Transcript evidence shows implementation code was written before RED-phase tests, but handoff.skillFeedback reports followedProcedure=true with no deviations.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl skeleton for session e274e9e3-4b08-46b0-9c73-209525b4d945 shows Create lib/bropilot/traceability/auto_linker.ex before creating test/traceability_auto_linker_test.exs, while .factory/skills/elixir-backend/SKILL.md step 3 says to write tests first.

summary: Reviewed feature traceability-auto-linkage at commit 03dbff7 using handoff, transcript skeleton, and code diff. Core auto-linking is present, but two requirement-level gaps remain: stale-link replacement on rerun is not implemented and task context entity refs are not mapped. Marking this review as fail until those blocking issues are addressed.
